# GitKraken Insights

> GitKraken Insights turns raw Git data into clear, actionable engineering metrics. It measures pull request activity, DORA performance, AI tool impact, code quality, and delivery velocity in a single configurable dashboard.

## Documentation

- [Getting Started with GitKraken Insights](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights/): Learn how to request access, understand plan availability, and connect your data in GitKraken Insights.
- [Dashboard Configuration](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights-dashboard-management/): Learn how to create dashboards, add metrics, arrange widget layouts, apply trendlines, and filter data in GitKraken Insights.
- [DORA Metrics](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights-dora-metrics/): Learn about DORA metrics in GitKraken Insights, including Deploy Frequency, Change Lead Time, Mean Time to Repair/Recover, and Defect Rate.
- [Pull Request Metrics](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights-pr-metrics/): Learn about Pull Request metrics in GitKraken Insights, including cycle time, lead time, review activity, and code review hours.
- [AI Impact Metrics](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights-ai-impact-metrics/): Learn about AI Impact metrics in GitKraken Insights, including code rework, duplication, suggestion acceptance rates, and active AI tool usage.
- [Code Quality Metrics](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights-code-quality-metrics/): Learn about Code Quality metrics in GitKraken Insights, including Bug Work Percent, Documentation and Test Percent, Code Change Rate, and Code Change by Operation.
- [Velocity and Delivery Consistency Metrics](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights-velocity-metrics/): Learn about Velocity and Delivery Consistency metrics in GitKraken Insights, including Commit Count and Estimated Coding Hours.
- [Metric Settings](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights-metric-settings/): Learn how to configure release tracking, issue detection, issue tracker projects, critical defect terms, and measurement settings in GitKraken Insights.
- [FAQ](https://help.gitkraken.com/gk-insights/gk-insights-faq/): Answers to common questions about GitKraken Insights, including access, integrations, available metrics, and customization.
